falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset surges above the previous 52-week high by at least 15% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout above key resistance would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal, indicating a strong bullish trend contrary to the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 30-day average volume on at least 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would indicate a high-probability trend reversal or breakout, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal's implication of stagnation.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 index closes above the 200-day moving average by 2.5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A confirmed bullish trend in the major index would invalidate the current 'UNKNOWN' verdict by providing clear macro-level confirmation of a trend shift.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
